analysis.first_500_chars:
# create Event ce-create## Summary `create` A `create` event occurs when a collection is created on a watched database and the change stream has the [showExpandedEvents](https://mongodbcom-cdn.staging.corp.mongodb.com/docs/reference/change-events/#std-label-change-streams-expanded-events) option set to `true`. ## Description
Field Type Description
`_id`
